x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Program Validity Term
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rules defining how long earned incentives remain valid.

Comment:
Rewards expire after 90 days
Points expire after 24 months of inactivity
No reinstatement after expiration

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Program Limit Term
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Maximum limits imposed on incentives.

Comment:
Maximum cashback capped at $200 per customer
Offer limited to first 1,000 participants
One reward per customer

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Program Exclusion Term
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Conditions specifying transactions or customers that are not eligible.

Comment:
Cash advances excluded
Internal transfers excluded
Employees not eligible

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Program Adjustment Term
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Circumstances under which incentives may be reversed or canceled.

Comment:
Reward reversed if transaction refunded
Account closure voids reward eligibility
Fraudulent activity results in disqualification

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Program Compliance Term
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Legal framework governing the program.

Comment:
Subject to governing law
Bank reserves right to modify program
Disputes resolved under arbitration clause

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Program Termination Term
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Rules allowing the bank to amend or discontinue the program.

Comment:
Bank may change program terms with notice
Program may be terminated at any time
Benefits subject to availability

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Program Eligibily Term for Enrollment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Enrollment rules define how and when participants can join the incentive program.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Program Eligibility Term for Incentive Accrual
x-enumeration-literals.description: Accrual rules define how and when incentives are earned and calculated.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Incentive Program Eligibility Term for Incentive Redemption
x-enumeration-literals.description: Eligibility conditions for redemption define who can redeem incentives, and redemption rules define how, when, and under what conditions incentives can be exchanged for rewards.
